author: codex-duplicate-audit

patch.value: Extract reusable semantic HTTP mock fixtures

Duplicate audit 2026-05-22: semantic/vector tests duplicate globalThis.fetch stubs for OpenAI embeddings and Qdrant upsert responses. The repeated mock block appears in tests/unit/health-command.spec.ts:539, tests/unit/reindex-command.spec.ts:204, and tests/unit/search-cache.spec.ts, including the same /v1/embeddings and /collections/pm_items/points?wait=true response handling. This is separate from the broader shared item factory duplication because it is domain-specific semantic infrastructure with enough behavior to drift. Fix by adding a focused helper such as installSemanticFetchMock({ embeddings, qdrantStatus, captureCalls }) and migrating health/reindex/search-cache tests to it.

Semantic tests share one typed HTTP mock fixture for embeddings and Qdrant responses; tests can still customize input-count embeddings and failure paths; duplicated global fetch setup/restore blocks are removed from health, reindex, and search-cache specs; targeted semantic/search tests pass.

value.author: codex-duplicate-audit
value.text: Duplicate-check evidence: searched tracker for Qdrant/fetch mock duplication. Results only showed broad pm-rnpb and closed vector-store work; no open item tracks the duplicated test HTTP mocks. Scan found overlapping 10-12 line windows in health, reindex, and search-cache specs.

message: Create duplicate semantic HTTP mock finding

value.author: claude-code-agent
value.text: Added tests/helpers/semanticFetchMock.ts: installSemanticFetchMock({embeddings, qdrantUpsert, qdrantDelete}) routing /v1/embeddings + /collections/pm_items/points{,/delete}?wait=true, returning {calls, inputLengths, restore}; plus fakeResponse/embeddingsResponse/qdrantAckResponse builders and installFailingFetchMock for whole-fetch failure paths. Migrated all 3 specs: health-command (2 semantic blocks; left the 'fetch must not be called' guard + non-semantic fetchMock untouched), reindex-command (5 blocks incl. retry-then-success via embeddings callback + fakeResponse, and input-length capture via mock.inputLengths), search-cache (8 blocks incl. delete-only, retry, 2 failure paths). Tests still customize input-count embeddings (default) and failure/retry paths. Net: removed ~430 lines of duplicated inline fetch stubs across the 3 specs. Result: 3 files passed, 63 tests passed; build green. No assertion changes.

patch.value: Extracted tests/helpers/semanticFetchMock.ts (installSemanticFetchMock + response builders + installFailingFetchMock); migrated health-command/reindex-command/search-cache specs off duplicated inline OpenAI/Qdrant fetch stubs. Customization (input-count embeddings, retry/failure paths) preserved. 63 tests pass; build green.
Extracted shared semantic HTTP mock fixtures (tests/helpers/semanticFetchMock.ts) and migrated all 3 specs; 63 tests pass, build green.
Semantic HTTP mock fixtures are shared and no duplicated mock setup remains in affected tests.
Shared semanticFetchMock helper is linked in the refactor branch and focused/static/full release gates passed.
